revision.text:
<!-- Add categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata --> == About == For use within other modules.
Returns a table of regular expressions, sorted by descending popularity, for all redirects to a given template as of a certain date, or nil.
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line; interwikis at Wikidata -->
}}</includeonly>

<!-- Add categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata -->
== About ==
For use within other modules. 

Returns a table of regular expressions, sorted by descending popularity, for all redirects to a given template as of a certain date, or nil.

== See also ==
* {{tl|Navseasoncats}}
* {{tl|Resolve category redirect}}

<includeonly>{{Sandbox other||
<!-- Categories below this line; interwikis at Wikidata -->

}}</includeonly>

<!-- Add categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata -->
{{High-use|risk}}
== About ==
For use within other modules. 

Returns a table of regular expressions, sorted by descending popularity, for all redirects to a given template as of a certain date, or nil.

== See also ==
* {{tl|Navseasoncats}}
* {{tl|Resolve category redirect}}

<includeonly>{{Sandbox other||
<!-- Categories below this line; interwikis at Wikidata -->

}}</includeonly>

revision.comment: /* See also */ Link to modules instead, since they do the calling; +1
revision.text:
<!-- Add categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata --> {{High-use|risk}} == About == For use within other modules.
Returns a table of regular expressions, sorted by descending popularity, for all redirects to a given template as of a certain date, or nil.
== See also == * [[Module:Navseasoncats]] * [[Module:Resolve category redirect]] * [[Module:Taxonbar/exists]]
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line; interwikis at Wikidata -->
}}</includeonly>

<!-- Add categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata --> {{High-use|risk}} == About == For use within other modules.
Returns a table of regular expressions, sorted by descending popularity, for all redirects to a given template as of a certain date, or nil.
== See also == * [[Module:Category series navigation]] * [[Module:Resolve category redirect]] * [[Module:Taxonbar/exists]]
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line; interwikis at Wikidata -->
}}</includeonly>

<!-- Add categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata --> {{High-use|risk}} == About == For use within other modules.
Returns a table of regular expressions, sorted by descending popularity, for a parent template and all redirects to it as of a certain date, or nil.
== See also == * [[Module:Category series navigation]] * [[Module:Resolve category redirect]] * [[Module:Taxonbar/exists]]
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line; interwikis at Wikidata -->
}}</includeonly>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 6 revisions imported from [[:wikipedia:Module:Template_redirect_regex/doc]]
revision.text:
<!-- Add categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata --> {{High-use|risk}} == About == For use within other modules.
Returns a table of regular expressions, sorted by descending popularity, for a parent template and all redirects to it as of a certain date, or nil.
== See also == * [[Module:Category series navigation]] * [[Module:Resolve category redirect]] * [[Module:Taxonbar/exists]]
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line; interwikis at Wikidata -->
}}</includeonly>
